dutch_ocr:
ANTIREVOLUTIONAIRE
STAATKUNDE

MET NADERE TOELICHTING
OP ONS PROGRAM DOOR
Dr. A. KUYPER

„Het Calvinisme oorsprong en waarborg
van onze Constitutioneele vrijheden”.
GROEN VAN PRINSTERER.

EERSTE DEEL
DE BEGINSELEN

J. H. KOK – 1916 – KAMPEN
english_translation:
ANTIREVOLUTIONARY
STATECRAFT

WITH FURTHER ELUCIDATION
OF OUR PROGRAM BY
Dr. A. KUYPER

“Calvinism, the origin and guarantee
of our Constitutional liberties.”
GROEN VAN PRINSTERER.

FIRST PART
THE PRINCIPLES

J. H. KOK – 1916 – KAMPEN
notes: This page is a title page, hence the short, declarative phrases rather than long, periodic sentences. The translation maintains the elevated vocabulary and precise terminology as per the OpenKuyper Translation Voice Standards.
